field_values.action_summary: After hours of isolation, the protagonist uses intense mental willpower to break the paralysis. Upon standing, he realizes he has undergone a metamorphosis: his new, naked self stands upright while his original, clothed body remains lying lifeless on the cave floor.
field_values.emotional_beat: From intense mental struggle to profound shock and existential horror.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of physical struggle/effort; Wide or medium reveal shot showing both standing naked figure and lying clothed body; Close-ups of face during realization
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Exact spatial placement of old body relative to new self's standing position
Lighting consistency between the two versions of the character
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute the central supernatural twist by transitioning from a physical struggle against paralysis to the visual discovery of two distinct versions of the protagonist. The scene must maintain strict spatial relationship between the standing naked figure and the lying clothed corpse within the deep shadows of the cave.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (The "New" Self)
- protagonist (The "Old" Body/Clothed)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave (Deep shadows, rocky floor)

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact spatial placement of old body relative to where new self stands.
- Lighting consistency between the two versions of the character.

## Beat List
- BT001: Intense mental struggle to break paralysis.
- BT002: The metamorphosis and standing up.
- BT003: Realization of the old body/existential horror.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
